name: Avant-Garde Lamp
description: A bold sculptural floor lamp with a brushed-brass arm and an opal-glass shade. Ambient warm light for reading nooks and entryways.

name: Comfy Sectional Sofa
description: Modular sectional with deep seats, removable covers, and a hardwood frame. Configurable for studios up to great rooms.

name: Minimalist Wooden Desk
description: Solid oak desk with cable management and a smooth matte finish. Sized for a 27-inch monitor and a focused setup.

name: Modern Lounge Chair
description: Curved walnut frame with linen upholstery. Ergonomic recline angle and removable seat cushion.

name: Industrial Bookshelf
description: Steel-and-pine shelving unit with five tiers. Open-back design pairs equally well with books, plants, or vinyl.

name: Contemporary Dining Table
description: Six-seat dining table with a tempered-glass top and powder-coated steel legs. Easy to clean, comfortable for long dinners.
